# CONSTRUCT query, Turtle response.
endpoint: sparql_query
classification: spec-required
match_mode: status-only
description: CONSTRUCT WHERE returns Turtle response (200, content-type)

=== request
GET /sparql?query=CONSTRUCT%20WHERE%20%7B%20%3Fs%20%3Fp%20%3Fo%20%7D
Accept: text/turtle

=== response
200
Content-Type: text/turtle
